question: 顯示近30天外資買賣超前10名
sql: SELECT symbol, name, SUM(foreign_net) AS total_foreign_net FROM public.institutional_daily WHERE trade_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY symbol, name ORDER BY total_foreign_net DESC LIMIT 10
chart_code:
fig = px.bar(df, x='name', y='total_foreign_net', title='近30天外資買超前10名', labels={'name': '股票', 'total_foreign_net': '外資淨買超(張)'}, color='total_foreign_net', color_continuous_scale='RdYlGn')
fig.update_layout(xaxis_tickangle=-45)

question: 我的持股庫存狀況
sql: SELECT symbol, name, shares, avg_cost, price_now, unrealized_profit, unrealized_profit_pct FROM alice.portfolio_holdings ORDER BY value_mkt DESC
chart_code:
colors = ['#ef4444' if x < 0 else '#22c55e' for x in df['unrealized_profit_pct']]
fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=df['name'], y=df['unrealized_profit_pct'], marker_color=colors))
fig.update_layout(title='持股未實現損益 (%)', xaxis_title='股票', yaxis_title='損益率 (%)', xaxis_tickangle=-45)

question: 台積電近半年K線走勢
sql: SELECT c.ts::date AS trade_date, c.open, c.high, c.low, c.close, c.volume FROM public.candles c JOIN public.instruments i ON c.instrument_id = i.id WHERE i.symbol = '2330' AND c.timeframe = '1D' AND c.ts >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days' ORDER BY c.ts
chart_code:
import plotly.graph_objects as go
fig = go.Figure(go.Candlestick(x=df['trade_date'], open=df['open'], high=df['high'], low=df['low'], close=df['close']))
fig.update_layout(title='台積電 (2330) 近半年K線', xaxis_title='日期', yaxis_title='價格', xaxis_rangeslider_visible=False)

question: 近一週融資融券變化最大的股票
sql: SELECT symbol, name, SUM(margin_change) AS total_margin_change, SUM(short_change) AS total_short_change FROM public.margin_daily WHERE trade_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY symbol, name ORDER BY ABS(SUM(margin_change)) DESC LIMIT 15
chart_code:
fig = px.bar(df, x='name', y=['total_margin_change', 'total_short_change'], title='近一週融資融券變化 Top 15', labels={'name': '股票', 'value': '變化量(張)'}, barmode='group')
fig.update_layout(xaxis_tickangle=-45, legend_title='類型')

question: 三大法人近一個月每日買賣超趨勢
sql: SELECT trade_date, SUM(foreign_net) AS foreign_total, SUM(sitc_net) AS sitc_total, SUM(dealer_net) AS dealer_total FROM public.institutional_daily WHERE trade_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY trade_date ORDER BY trade_date
chart_code:
fig = px.line(df, x='trade_date', y=['foreign_total', 'sitc_total', 'dealer_total'], title='三大法人近一個月每日買賣超趨勢', labels={'trade_date': '日期', 'value': '淨買超(張)'})
fig.update_layout(legend_title='法人類別')
for trace, name in zip(fig.data, ['外資', '投信', '自營商']):
    trace.name = name
